Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As night falls, the commercial district is enveloped in a lively atmosphere, filled with cheerful, bustling crowds.'}
{3: 'You deliberately arrived a bit early and found a spot to sit, quietly waiting for the quirky, whimsical girl to show up.'}
{3: 'You didn\'t have to wait long before you felt a light touch on the shoulder.'}
{2: '(Turn around)', 3: '8'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'You turn around to find no one there, only to feel another gentle tap on your other shoulder—as if some invisible "ghost" is playing tricks on you.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg'}
{2: '(Reach both hands backward simultaneously)', 3: '20'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Ah, that\'s cheating—!', 4: '18'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'DialogShake'}

{3: 'Jetavie, who had been playfully teasing you with her tail from behind, is suddenly caught as your hands reach back to embrace her. After a moment of pretend "struggle," she gives up and wraps you in a wholehearted bear hug.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg', 4: '1'}
{1: '0', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'I can\'t believe you caught on so quickly. How boring! But guess what? I totally caught your reaction on camera just now.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl raises her camera triumphantly, holding it right in front of you.'}
{3: 'As she flicks through the small display screen, photos flash by in quick succession—true to her word, each one captures you wandering around the commercial district just moments ago.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory262.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory261.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg'}
{3: 'You see yourself wandering alone through the streets, sitting by the roadside waiting for her, and even the moment you reach back trying to catch her tail...'}
{2: 'So you\'ve been secretly taking photos of me this whole time.', 3: '50', 4: 'Your photography skills are pretty impressive.', 5: '50'}
{1: '1', 3: 'After proudly showing off her "masterpieces," Jetavie settles down right beside you, pressing close.'}

{2: 'Jetavie', 3: '"The Chosen One, Rendered Completely Helpless Under the Absolute Control of the All-Powerful Jetavie, Forced to Reveal Rarely Seen Expressions of Embarrassment"—how about that for our photo shoot theme?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sounds perfect.', 3: '58', 4: 'Not very appropriate.', 5: '60', 6: '...', 7: '60'}
{3: 'Having received your approval, the girl breaks into a satisfied smile.'}
{3: 'Displeased with the response, Jetavie pouts, her tail swishing back and forth behind her as she contemplates how to "punish" her human companion.'}
{3: 'But after a moment, a mischievous smile creeps back onto her face.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Alright, let\'s forget about those previous shots. Now, the camera is all yours, 【kuroname】.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'You can take whatever photos you want—but every single one must have both Jetavie and you in it!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Because today is our special Valentine\'s Day, so you know what that means... don\'t you, my dear Cho-sen One?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Absolutely.', 3: '71'}
{2: 'Today, you can shoot our "couple photos" however you like.', 3: '72'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Oh? Is that all you have to say? I thought you\'d...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Seemingly dissatisfied with just a verbal "response," she presses herself closer against you. Her warm breath lingers near as a hint of blush rises on her cheeks.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Mmm, I was thinking the same thing... but that alone isn\'t enough.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Whether it\'s today or every day I want to spend with you from now on, I want us to be just like this.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'The story between the Chosen One and Jetavie still has so many chapters to unfold, just like we are now—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl takes the perfect moment to link arms with her companion, beaming with a radiant smile as she motions for them both to face the camera.'}
{2: '(Press the shutter now)', 3: '88'}
{3: '—but the camera only responds with a "Low Battery" warning beep.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Ugh, why now of all times... Hey, 【kuroname】, you have to take responsibility for this "accident"!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Isn\'t that a bit of a stretch...?', 3: '93', 4: 'The camera wasn\'t even with me just now...', 5: '93'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Because I was so eager to see you sooner, I rushed out without charging it properly, and then I\'ve been busy taking pictures of you this whole time...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Got it. So that\'s what happened.', 3: '96'}
{3: 'With the shooting of "couple photo" disrupted, the girl wears a bored expression, her tail swishing back and forth as she seemingly waits for you to provide a "solution."'}
{3: 'Inspired by her absent-minded movements, you point to Jetavie\'s constantly swishing tail.'}
{2: 'Don\'t you have that very handy tool...?', 3: '102'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Oh—I almost forgot about that! Thanks for reminding me!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Good thing you reminded me. Otherwise, we wouldn\'t be able to capture tonight\'s memories properly.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Hearing your unexpected suggestion, the girl\'s face instantly lights up with approval and delight.'}
{3: 'Jetavie wraps her tail around the camera, using it like a portable charger to power up the device, then leans back against you.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'But Jetavie easily gets bored while waiting for the camera battery to charge.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Chosen One, you\'d better think carefully... about what we could do while we wait.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'An ice cream eating contest, a trip to the arcade, or...?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Anything works for me.', 3: '119', 4: 'Let\'s go with whatever you want.', 5: '119'}
{3: 'You respond to her invitation with an instinctive, gentle smile, and the girl\'s face lights up with approval.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Even if we can\'t take photos, this plan isn\'t so bad either, right, 【kuroname】?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Indeed.', 3: '123', 4: 'The feeling of being together matters more than how we spend it.', 5: '123'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Then let\'s go!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl clings tightly to your arm, pressing almost her entire body weight against you.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory550.jpg', 4: '1'}

{3: 'You spend time with Jetavie visiting various shops and attractions until nearly midnight, when she reluctantly brings the night\'s entertainment to a pause, sitting beside you at a street corner.'}
{3: 'In the night\'s embrace, she seems somewhat tired, gently resting her head on your shoulder.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Commandant, I\'m really happy today... I want you to remember everything we did together today too.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'She falls silent for a moment, then lifts her gaze toward the distance, her expression growing intensely serious, as if peering into countless moments of the future.'}
{3: 'The street\'s neon lights illuminate her face, revealing endless hope and happiness gathering in her eyes at this very instant.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'No, not just today, but tomorrow, the future... all the countless moments to come, 【kuroname】, you have to remember them all... Promise?', 4: '18'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1403.jpg', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The girl extends her finger toward you, waiting for your response.'}
{2: '(Reach out in response)', 3: '149'}
{3: 'Watching your fingers lock firmly together, her gaze softens. Endless hope and happiness seem to converge in her eyes at this very moment.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}

{3: 'Click—as her words linger in the air, a shutter sound comes from above. Looking up, you find her holding the now fully-charged camera with the tip of her tail, capturing this moment that belongs only to the two of you.'}
{3: 'The camera falls back into her palm as she gazes with satisfaction at the image of the two of you on the display screen.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'This happy moment with Commandant... Jetavie has captured it perfectly.', 4: '1'}

{3: 'Jetavie leans in even closer, a playful smile dancing in her eyes. Her tail has, at some point, stealthily wrapped around the back of your neck, the light touch of its tip sending a subtle tingling sensation.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: '【kuroname】, don\'t you dare forget anything about tonight. Otherwise, I\'ll...', 4: '1'}
